name: voterverse
description: VoterVerse — AI Election Process Education Assistant

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend"
scripts.test: npm run test:mock && npm run coverage --prefix backend && npm run coverage --prefix frontend
scripts.ci: npm run test:mock && npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
